b:T70fa,<div class="specification">
<p>A student designed an experiment to study the transpiration through the leaves of a tomato plant (<em>Solanum lycopersicum</em>). Measurements were taken in the initial conditions with five leaves on a tomato shoot and then again after each of the five leaves was removed.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: center;">[Source: R. C. Hodson and J. Acuff . 2006. Water transport in plants: anatomy and physiology in<br/><em>Tested Studies for Laboratory Teaching</em>, Volume <strong>27</strong> pp 163–183]</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Describe the trend in the data.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Transpiration continued after the fifth leaf had been removed. Suggest what can be concluded.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State the independent variable in this investigation.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Explain how the results in the graph could have been obtained.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>c:T4ee,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>negative correlation between the number of leaves <span style="text-decoration: underline;">removed</span> and transpiration rate <em>Do not accept type of correlation alone, as a description is required</em>.<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>as more leaves are removed the transpiration rate drops ✔ <em>OWTTE</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>transpiration does not only occur in the leaves<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>transpiration through stem/shoot ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>number of leaves «removed» ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. using a potometer ✔ <em>Accept transpirometer but not respirometer</em>.</p>
<p>b. leafy shoot attached to a reservoir and a graduated «capillary» tube ✔</p>
<p>c. as transpiration increases water uptake «by roots» also increases ✔</p>
<p>d. distance/time for bubble «in capillary tube» to travel is used to measure transpiration rate ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/9/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","9"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19N.3.HL.TZ0.2"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","9-1-transport-in-the-xylem-of-plants"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.i.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.ii.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
